record.field: claimants_lines = record.partner_id.x_claimants_line_ids for claimant_line in claimants_lines: # One invoice per claimant for invoice in record.invoice_ids: new_invoice = invoice.copy({'partner_id': claimant_line.x_claimants.id}) for orig_line, new_line in zip(invoice.invoice_line_ids, new_invoice.invoice_line_ids): # if orig_line.product_id: new_line.write({'price_unit': new_line.price_unit / len(claimants_lines) if new_line.price_unit else 0.0}) invoice.write({'state': 'cancel'}) action = env['ir.actions.act_window']._for_xml_id('account.action_move_out_invoice')
Industry Lawyer: Split Invoice per Claimant From Quotation

claimants_lines = record.partner_id.x_claimants_line_ids for claimant_line in claimants_lines: # One invoice per claimant new_invoice = record.copy({'partner_id': claimant_line.x_claimants.id}) for orig_line, new_line in zip(record.invoice_line_ids, new_invoice.invoice_line_ids): # if orig_line.product_id: new_line.write({'price_unit': new_line.price_unit / len(claimants_lines) if new_line.price_unit else 0.0}) record.write({'state': 'cancel'})
Industry Lawyer: Split Invoice per Claimant

current_record = env[record.model].browse(record._evaluate_res_ids()) if not record.partner_ids: #only for crm lead record['partner_ids']= [(6, 0, [current_record.partner_id.id])] suggest_approver = env.user.x_suggest_approver if suggest_approver: record.write({'x_approval_id': suggest_approver}) record.write({'partner_ids': [(4, pid) for pid in set(record.partner_ids.mapped('x_claimants_line_ids.x_claimants').ids)], 'x_is_high_group_user': env.user.has_group('industry_lawyer.group_high')})
Industry Lawyer: Update Additional Contacts in Mail Compose
Industry Lawyer: Update Additional Contacts in Account Move Send

for wizard in records: if not wizard.x_approval_id: raise UserError("Please select an approval user before submitting this email for approval.") mail = env['mail.mail'].create({'attachment_ids': [(6, 0, [attach.id for attach in wizard.attachment_ids])], 'body_html': wizard.body or '', 'partner_ids': wizard.partner_ids.ids, 'author_id': env.user.partner_id.id, 'x_author_id': env.user.id, 'scheduled_date': wizard.scheduled_date, 'subject': wizard.subject or '', 'recipient_ids': [(6, 0, wizard.partner_ids.ids)], 'reply_to': wizard.reply_to or False,}) mail_for_approval = env['x_approval_mail'].create({'x_mail_mail': mail.id, 'x_approval_status': 'pending', 'x_approved_by_id': wizard.x_approval_id.id, 'x_res_model': wizard.model, 'x_res_id': wizard._evaluate_res_ids()[0]}) env.user.write({'x_suggest_approver': wizard.x_approval_id.id}) high_group_user_mail = mail.copy({'x_author_id': wizard.x_approval_id.id}) mail_for_approval.copy({'x_mail_mail': high_group_user_mail.id})

for wizard in records: if not wizard.x_invoice_approval_by: raise UserError("Please select an approval user before submitting this email for approval.") move_id = wizard.move_id if not move_id.invoice_pdf_report_id: invoices_data_pdf = {move.sudo(): {**wizard._get_default_sending_settings(move, from_cron=False, **wizard._get_sending_settings()),} for move in wizard.move_id} wizard._prepare_invoice_pdf_report(invoices_data_pdf) pdf_attachment_values = invoices_data_pdf[move_id]['pdf_attachment_values'] attachment = wizard.sudo().env['ir.attachment'].create({'name': pdf_attachment_values.get('name'), 'raw': pdf_attachment_values.get('raw'), 'type': 'binary'}) else: attachment = move_id.invoice_pdf_report_id
mail = env['mail.mail'].create({ 'attachment_ids': [(6, 0, [attachment.id])], 'body_html': wizard.body or '', 'partner_ids': wizard.mail_partner_ids.ids, 'author_id': env.user.partner_id.id, 'x_author_id': env.user.id, 'subject': wizard.subject or '', 'recipient_ids': [(6, 0, wizard.mail_partner_ids.ids)],}) mail_for_approval = env['x_approval_mail'].create({'x_mail_mail': mail.id, 'x_approval_status': 'pending', 'x_approved_by_id': wizard.x_invoice_approval_by.id, 'x_res_model': wizard.model, 'x_res_id': move_id.id}) wizard.mail_partner_ids.write({'x_suggest_approval': wizard.x_invoice_approval_by}) high_group_user_mail = mail.copy({'x_author_id': wizard.x_invoice_approval_by.id}) mail_for_approval.copy({'x_mail_mail': high_group_user_mail.id})
Industry Lawyer: Submit For Approval in Account Move Send

for record in records: mail = record.x_mail_mail mail.send() if mail.state == 'sent': env[records.x_res_model].browse(records.x_res_id).message_post(body = record.x_body_html, message_type='comment', subtype_xmlid = 'mail.mt_comment', attachment_ids = record.x_attachment_ids.ids) records.write({'x_approval_status': 'sent'}) action = env['ir.actions.act_window']._for_xml_id('industry_lawyer.approval_email_action')
records.write({'x_approval_status': 'pending'}) for rec in records: rec.x_mail_mail.write({'state': 'outgoing'})
records.write({'x_approval_status': 'cancelled'}) for rec in records: rec.x_mail_mail.write({'state': 'cancel'})
